nodes.label: Posterior cingulate
nodes.role: Hub of the wandering mind, where exploration begins.

nodes.label: Medial PFC
nodes.role: Imagining possibilities and self-referential what-ifs.

nodes.label: Precuneus
nodes.role: Mental imagery. Picturing the design before it exists.

nodes.label: Angular gyrus
nodes.role: Connecting ideas across domains, analogy and metaphor.

nodes.label: Angular gyrus
nodes.role: Connecting ideas across domains, analogy and metaphor.

nodes.label: Lateral temporal cortex
nodes.role: Semantic memory. The vocabulary of past work.

nodes.label: Lateral temporal cortex
nodes.role: Semantic memory. The vocabulary of past work.

nodes.label: Hippocampal formation
nodes.role: Recombining memories into something new.

nodes.label: Hippocampal formation
nodes.role: Recombining memories into something new.

nodes.label: Ventromedial PFC
nodes.role: Taste. Does this feel right?

nodes.label: Temporal pole
nodes.role: Abstract concepts that anchor a vision.

nodes.label: Temporal pole
nodes.role: Abstract concepts that anchor a vision.

nodes.label: Dorsolateral PFC
nodes.role: The executive. Holds the plan and keeps you on it.

nodes.label: Dorsolateral PFC
nodes.role: The executive. Holds the plan and keeps you on it.

nodes.label: Posterior parietal
nodes.role: Manipulating structure: code, layout, systems.

nodes.label: Posterior parietal
nodes.role: Manipulating structure: code, layout, systems.

nodes.label: Frontopolar (BA10)
nodes.role: Juggling sub-goals, the meta-level of the craft.

nodes.label: Intraparietal sulcus
nodes.role: Directing attention to what matters right now.

nodes.label: Intraparietal sulcus
nodes.role: Directing attention to what matters right now.

nodes.label: Pre-supplementary motor
nodes.role: Sequencing actions, the order of the build.

nodes.label: Dorsomedial PFC
nodes.role: Monitoring the plan against reality.

nodes.label: Lateral PFC
nodes.role: Inhibiting distraction. Saying no to scope creep.

nodes.label: Lateral PFC
nodes.role: Inhibiting distraction. Saying no to scope creep.

nodes.label: Frontal eye field
nodes.role: Pointing focus at the next concrete step.

nodes.label: Anterior insula
nodes.role: The switch. Flags what's worth attention and flips the brain to it.

nodes.label: Anterior insula
nodes.role: The switch. Flags what's worth attention and flips the brain to it.

nodes.label: Dorsal ACC
nodes.role: Calls the switch. Conflict and salience detector.

nodes.label: Ventral striatum
nodes.role: Reward. The spark when something clicks.

nodes.label: Supramarginal gyrus
nodes.role: Sensing the moment to change course.

nodes.label: Supramarginal gyrus
nodes.role: Sensing the moment to change course.

nodes.label: Anterior thalamus
nodes.role: Relay. Broadcasts the switch signal brain-wide.

nodes.label: Amygdala
nodes.role: Stakes. How much this moment matters.

nodes.label: Amygdala
nodes.role: Stakes. How much this moment matters.
